author: w3Lb
content: Plan: 0.3.0 is published, so the two #114 fix entries I'd folded into [0.3.0]'s Fixed section (sentinel discovery, splice OOM) must move into a new [0.3.1] - 2026-06-10 section — the published 0.3.0 doesn't contain them. Then bump workspace version 0.3.0 -> 0.3.1 (5 strings: workspace.package.version + 4 internal dep pins), refresh Cargo.lock, full test/clippy/fmt, single commit. Patch bump is correct: two bug fixes, no API changes.
